response:
Brittany washes her hair every other day, which means she uses shampoo 183 times in a leap year of 366 days, consuming a total of 45.75 ounces. Since each bottle holds 14 ounces, she will need to purchase [number_of_bottles] to cover the entire year, leaving her with a small remainder of [remaining_ounces].

This calculation assumes she starts on the first day of the year and continues the pattern without interruption until the final day. You can verify the math by dividing the total ounces needed by the bottle size and rounding up to the nearest whole number to ensure she does not run out.
